source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Practical English operations UI with tabular sensor values and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese field notes, habitat surveys, maintenance, and monitoring screens.
layout: Dense 8px wetland grids, reed-green navigation, water-level dashboards, field survey forms, observation tables, fur/reed/water texture samples, restrained cards, and sturdy operational controls.

prompts.label: Transparent muskrat motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a muskrat motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete full-body mammal subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A realistic muskrat, compact semi-aquatic wetland mammal with warm brown waterproof fur, darker guard hairs, rounded small ears, blunt whiskered muzzle, small black eyes, practical sturdy body, visible small paws, and a long narrow laterally flattened tail. The identity must read clearly as muskrat, not beaver, otter, rat, nutria, mink, or capybara.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full body, head, paws, and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves fur texture and warm brown reed-marsh coloration. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no water, no reeds, no burrow, no landscape, no props, no text, no watermark, no second animal, no beaver paddle tail, no otter-like long sleek body.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Muskrat light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a true high-resolution 3840x2160 light-mode design-system board for Morphous Muskrat, derived from the isolated muskrat motif and warm brown reed green water palette.
Required visible sections: identity, palette, typography with English and Japanese guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, states, texture, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, and sample usage.
Style: practical wetland system, shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, 8px grid, muskrat fur texture, reed green controls, water blue-green charts, silt paper surfaces, tail leather borders.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no tiny unreadable text, no beaver or otter identity.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Muskrat dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a separate true high-resolution 3840x2160 dark-mode design-system board for Morphous Muskrat using the same motif, palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, and typography as the light board.
Required visible sections: identity, Dark Mode, palette, typography with English and Japanese guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, states, texture, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, and sample usage.
Style: deep wet fur charcoal, dark reed navigation, warm muskrat brown active states, water blue-green charts, silt text, tail-brown borders, crisp shadcn/tweakcn controls.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic black-and-orange gaming UI, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no beaver or otter identity.
